query: Let's create a traceability matrix mapping our acceptance criteria to the existing tests, find the coverage gaps, and give me a PASS/CONCERNS/FAIL gate decision.
I want to analyze test coverage for this story — which requirements have tests, which don't, and is the quality gate green?
Map every requirement to its tests and tell me whether we can release based on P0/P1 coverage.
The feature has coverage gaps — generate the missing automated tests to fill them following our existing patterns.
Write the red-phase failing acceptance tests for this story before we build it.
Design the risk-based test strategy and coverage plan for this epic before any tests exist.
